aboutParagraph1: A full-stack developer & ui designer who turns ideas into fast, accessible products with React, Next.js and .NET.
aboutParagraph2a: My experience in Agile environments has shaped a workflow centered on clean, scalable code and effective collaboration. While I have a strong foundation in full-stack development, I am particularly energized by solving complex problems in multi-developer teams and creating intuitive user interfaces backed by reliable systems.
aboutParagraph2b: I am currently sharpening my skills at Hive Helsinki, where I focus on deep technical problem-solving, rigorous code reviews, and peer-to-peer collaboration. Alongside this, I am actively building personal projects to explore new technologies. I thrive in collaborative, on-site environments where open communication and team discussions are part of the daily routine, as I believe they lead to better technical decisions and a stronger team bond.
aboutParagraph2c: When I’m not at my desk, I’m usually outdoors hiking, gardening, or working on something creative by hand. I am currently seeking a full-stack or front-end developer position where I can contribute to a driven team.
aboutParagraph2ReadLess: With experience in an Agile team, I have developed strong collaboration and problem-solving skills. My work involves front-end and back-end development using React TypeScript, C# .NET, and PostgreSQL to create robust full-stack applications.
bachelorDegreeExplanation: Learned fundamental and advanced concepts in numerical methods, software development, and programming, gaining expertise in designing and implementing software solutions and solving computational problems.
sataeduExperienceExplanation: Achieving B2.2 proficiency in Finnish, gaining insights into Finnish culture, and acquiring work experience in a Finnish work environment.
bearitExperienceExplanation: Gained insights from Finnish IT companies, collaborated in a team to develop modern software solutions, improved Finnish language proficiency, and learned software development tools from Udemy platform.

codecontrolExperienceExplanation: Designing web application layouts in Figma, developing front-end in React Typescript with Tailwind CSS and Material UI. Backend development with C# .Net and Entity Framework Core using PostgreSQL for Web API solution.
learnITExperienceExplanation: Collaborated as part of a team to build the Mittwatt application in Agile working methodology. Developed an electricity price prediction model in Python. Gained proficiency in Bitbucket, PostgreSQL, JavaScript, teamwork, and project management.

exploringTrailsAndMoviesDescription: When I’m away from the screen, I’m usually outdoors enjoying a walk and some fresh air or catching up on good investigation movies and series at home. It’s how I clear my head and get inspired for my next build.
